title: BrainScratchCommentariess Rifftrax On The Movies
wikitext:
[]: BrainScratchCommentaries's Rifftrax (On The Movies)             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Mon Jun 03, 2013 7:22 pm For those of you who want to like to hear other fans do a commentary on EOE and the first two Rebulid films, we have a fan group by the name of BrainScratchCommentaries to fill that gap. End of Eva Rebulid 1.11 Rebulid 2.22 Enjoy.

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Mon Jun 03, 2013 11:05 pm Listened to the one on EoE. I'm not sure if that was 95 minutes well spent or not.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Tue Jun 04, 2013 2:51 pm I'm a few minutes into the 1.11 riff, and they demonstrate a certain amount of knowledge of eva, hey they even make a Re eath reference so they get my vote. One guy seems to know the show and films well, another knows them quite well and doesnt like Eva. And they make a good point early on that few people in the west 'get' NGE because we didnt get as much (if any) supplemental material. So yeah, this is better than most of the reviews and riffs out there already. Give it the time of day. Edit: and they are watching 1.01, not 1.11 so the extra scenes make the riff go out of synch.
